## Steps to Reproduce

2. Run command '...'
3. Call tool '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Error Messages

```
Paste any error messages or logs here
```

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., macOS 13.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.10.5]
- FedDocMCP version: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- MCP client: [e.g., Claude Desktop 1.2.3]
